ext_desc.message: Detect the technologies, hosting, and server stack behind any website.

btn_deepscan_title.message: Probe REST API and version (makes a few extra requests)

btn_export_title.message: Export as a BIND zone file for Cloudflare import

st_dns_prompt_hint.message: Fetches A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, NS, TXT, SOA and CAA records via DNS-over-HTTPS.

st_sub_prompt_hint.message: Passive lookup via Certificate Transparency logs (crt.sh). Reads public records only — does not probe the target.

st_whois_prompt_hint.message: Registration data via RDAP/WHOIS. Note: most personal contact details (name, email, phone) are redacted by registrars under GDPR and may be unavailable.

st_unsupported_hint.message: Open a normal http(s) website to analyze its stack.

st_cant_read_hint.message: Try rescanning, or reload the page and reopen this panel.

tech_none_hint.message: This page exposes few public signals, or it loads its stack dynamically.

server_cors_note.message: headers read via direct request — some may be hidden by CORS

dns_fail_hint.message: Could not reach the DNS resolver. Try again.

dns_no_records_hint.message: This domain returned no DNS records of any type.

dns_no_domain_hint.message: Open a website to look up its DNS records.

sub_fail_hint.message: Could not reach the Certificate Transparency log.

sub_none_hint.message: No certificates referencing subdomains of this domain were found in CT logs.

sub_no_domain_hint.message: Open a website to discover its subdomains.

takes_time.message: This can take a few seconds.

whois_fail_hint.message: Could not reach the WHOIS service.

whois_not_registered_hint.message: This domain appears to be unregistered or has no WHOIS record.

whois_empty_response_hint.message: The WHOIS service responded, but returned no registrar, dates or contact fields for this domain.

whois_no_domain_hint.message: Open a website to look up its WHOIS record.

whois_gdpr_note.message: Some contact fields may be redacted by registrars under GDPR.

opt_sub.message: Configuration for the AI analysis integration.

opt_webhook_hint.message: The production webhook URL from your n8n Webhook node. Use HTTPS and a long, random path.

opt_token_hint.message: Sent as a custom header with each request. Configure the matching Header Auth credential in n8n.

hdr_hsts_desc.message: Forces browsers to connect over HTTPS, blocking protocol-downgrade and cookie-hijacking attacks.

hdr_hsts_nomaxage_issue.message: No max-age directive — browsers ignore the policy entirely.

hdr_hsts_nomaxage_fix.message: Add a max-age, e.g. max-age=31536000 (one year).

hdr_hsts_short_issue.message: max-age is $age$s, below the recommended one year (31536000s).

hdr_hsts_short_fix.message: Raise max-age to at least 31536000 and add includeSubDomains.

hdr_xfo_desc.message: Stops the page from being embedded in a frame, defending against clickjacking.

hdr_xfo_allowfrom_issue.message: ALLOW-FROM is deprecated and ignored by modern browsers.

hdr_xfo_allowfrom_fix.message: Use a Content-Security-Policy frame-ancestors directive instead, or set SAMEORIGIN.

hdr_xfo_invalid_issue.message: “$value$” is not a valid value; only DENY and SAMEORIGIN are honored.

hdr_xcto_desc.message: Stops browsers from MIME-sniffing a response away from its declared content type.

hdr_xcto_invalid_issue.message: “$value$” is not recognized; “nosniff” is the only valid value.

hdr_csp_desc.message: Restricts which scripts, styles and other resources may load, the strongest defense against XSS.

hdr_csp_weak_issue.message: Contains $tokens$, which re-opens the door to XSS the policy is meant to close.

hdr_csp_weak_fix.message: Remove unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval; use nonces or hashes for inline scripts.

hdr_referrer_desc.message: Controls how much of the originating URL is sent in the Referer header to other sites.

hdr_referrer_unsafe_issue.message: unsafe-url leaks the full URL (path and query) to every destination.

hdr_referrer_downgrade_issue.message: Sends the full URL to all same-or-stronger-security destinations — more than usually needed.

hdr_permissions_desc.message: Declares which browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation, etc.) the page may use.

hdr_xss_desc.message: Legacy header that toggled the browser's built-in reflected-XSS filter.

hdr_xss_legacy_issue.message: Deprecated and ignored by modern browsers; the filter it enabled has itself caused XSS in some browsers.

hdr_xss_legacy_fix.message: Remove this header and rely on a strong Content-Security-Policy instead.

hdr_partial_hint.message: These headers were read via a direct request, so CORS hides most security headers the server may actually send — headers shown as “missing” below may in fact be present.
